commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `src/agents/provider-stream.ts` guard and new Vitest coverage so `google-generative-ai` models throw unless `models.providers.google.api` is `google-generative-ai`.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +125. Total +161 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source and linked logs support the unsafe provider/transport mismatch class, but the PR proof does not show a real after-fix run.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor real-behavior proof and maintainer/security judgment on the Google auth contract before any repair or merge path is appropriate.

target.title: fix: fail closed for missing Google provider config
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #85042.

This fails closed when a Google Generative AI model is selected but the Google provider is missing or misconfigured.

Specifically, `google/gemini-*` models using `api: "google-generative-ai"` now require `models.providers.google` to exist with `api: "google-generative-ai"`. If the provider is missing, or if `models.providers.google` points at an OpenAI-compatible API, OpenClaw throws a local configuration error before stream registration.

## Security impact

This prevents Google model selections from falling through to OpenAI-compatible provider routing when the Google provider block is absent or unusable.

The error message does not include configured API keys.

## Validation

Targeted tests:

```text





















































^[[1m^[[30m^[[46m RUN ^[[49m^[[39m^[[22m ^[[36mv4.1.7 ^[[39m^[[90m/home/rev/projects/openclaw-pr-85042-clean^[[39m

 ^[[32m✓^[[39m ^[[30m^[[45m agents-core ^[[49m^[[39m ../../src/agents/provider-stream.test.ts ^[[2m(^[[22m^[[2m5 tests^[[22m^[[2m)^[[22m^[[32m 47^[[2mms^[[22m^[[39m
 ^[[32m✓^[[39m ^[[30m^[[45m agents-core ^[[49m^[[39m ../../src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/stream-resolution.test.ts ^[[2m(^[[22m^[[2m20 tests^[[22m^[[2m)^[[22m^[[32m 11^[[2mms^[[22m^[[39m
 ^[[32m✓^[[39m ^[[30m^[[43m agents-pi-embedded ^[[49m^[[39m ../../src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/stream-resolution.test.ts ^[[2m(^[[22m^[[2m20 tests^[[22m^[[2m)^[[22m^[[32m 29^[[2mms^[[22m^[[39m
 ^[[32m✓^[[39m ^[[30m^[[45m agents-support ^[[49m^[[39m ../../src/agents/provider-stream.test.ts ^[[2m(^[[22m^[[2m5 tests^[[22m^[[2m)^[[22m^[[32m 41^[[2mms^[[22m^[[39m

^[[2m Test Files ^[[22m ^[[1m^[[32m4 passed^[[39m^[[22m^[[90m (4)^[[39m
^[[2m      Tests ^[[22m ^[[1m^[[32m50 passed^[[39m^[[22m^[[90m (50)^[[39m
^[[2m   Start at ^[[22m 22:06:51
^[[2m   Duration ^[[22m 4.96s^[[2m (transform 1.66s, setup 535ms, import 3.78s, tests 129ms, environment 0ms)^[[22m
```

## Real behavior proof

behavior:
A Google Gemini fallback is configured while `models.providers.google` is absent.

environment:
Local OpenClaw source checkout from this PR branch.

steps:
1. Configure `agents.defaults.model.primary` as an OpenAI model.
2. Configure `agents.defaults.model.fallbacks` with `google/gemini-3.5-flash`.
3. Configure only `models.providers.openai`.
4. Attempt to register the selected Google model stream.
5. Observe local fail-closed behavior before stream registration.

evidence:

```text

```

observedResult:
OpenClaw fails locally with a clear missing Google provider configuration error. The configured OpenAI API key is not included in the error.

notTested:
A live request to Google Generative AI was not performed.
target.author: jason-allen-oneal
